# Transcrição: 14. Buy Sell Agreement

- **Fonte:** 14. Buy Sell Agreement
- **Duração:** 01:14
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 01:14]

You're all hot to get a deal, everybody's saying, yeah, yeah, yeah, it's go, go, go, but it's not. There's a buy-sell agreement going on in this company. That's cost me at least three deals that I know of and probably another three that I'm not aware of. There was a buy-sell going on while this person was conducting business and nobody can tell anybody. The only one that knows is maybe the major decision maker and a CFO, they're in cahoots to sell the company, but they got to keep conducting business as though we're conducting business and the mid-level managers were looking at your product, but the truth is the company is about to be sold or it's in a buy-sell and they can't actually take on new obligations and nobody can tell you. And you're sitting there saying, what do I not know? I've discounted my product, I've sold the product, I got the decision maker, everybody loves it, everybody says green light, there's something you don't know. Welcome to the real world. Welcome to planet earth where bad things happen to good people. Okay? Hopefully the buy-sell works for them. You just need to stay in there. Remember all these people that work in this company will be working somewhere when this buy-sell goes through. Be there whether it sells or doesn't be there for them on the other side.
